implementation_summary.summary: CP00-726 extends the RP24 Korean Legal Depth korean-legal descriptor from RP24.P02.M03.S01 through RP24.P02.M04.S18 across 40 planned P02 Primary Implementation Slice and Secondary Workflow Slice units while preserving CP00-722 through CP00-725 as historical evidence and keeping HWPX, Korean clause, litigation, court filing, corporate document, permission, audit, Hermes runtime, and product-state surfaces closed.

commit_policy.commit_message: Close CP00-726 Korean Legal Depth P02 implementation workflow slice pack

plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-726 RP24.P02.M03.S01-RP24.P02.M04.S18 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.
